chapter_title.ar: بَابُ مَنْ جَعَلَ عَلَى نَفْسِهِ صَوْماً مَعْلُوماً وَ مَنْ نَذَرَ أَنْ يَصُومَ فِي شُكْرٍ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 58 – The one who makes it upon himself specified Fasts, and the one who vows that he would be Fasting in appreciation

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/353)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول كالموثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/353)

parts.text: أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا صَلَوَاتُ اللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ

text: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ الرَّجُلِ يَجْعَلُ لِلَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَلَيْهِ صَوْمَ يَوْمٍ مُسَمًّى قَالَ يَصُومُهُ أَبَداً فِي السَّفَرِ وَ الْحَضَرِ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Al Fazal Bin Shazaan, from Ibn Abu Umeyr from Ibrahim Bin Abdul Hameed,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>, said, ‘I asked him<sup>asws</sup> about the man who Made it upon himself for the Sake of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic, Fasting of a specified day. He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘He should be Fasting it for ever, during the journey and the presence (at home)’.
en.sarwar: 9. Muhammad ibn ‘Isma‘il has narrated from al-Fadl ibn Shadhan from ibn abu ‘Umayr from Ibrahim ibn ‘Abd al-Hamid who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about a man who places upon himself for Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, fasting of a definite day. He (the Imam) said, ‘He is required to fast definitely, regardless of being on a journey or at home.’”
